entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum, the crop species being evaluated for its ability to recover from downy mildew infection

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The causal organism of downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A systemic disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that affects pearl millet

entities.name: RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait where plants develop symptomless shoots despite showing typical systemic symptoms of downy mildew

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to increase the frequency and level of recovery resistance in pearl millet genotypes

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A location where the resistance of lines produced from recovered plants was maintained

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A location where the recovery phenomenon in pearl millet was observed

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A location where the recovery phenomenon in pearl millet was observed

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing durable resistance in Pennisetum americanum by exploiting recovery resistance
